reason: While the tweet contains hostile language against Houthis and prays for their destruction, it does not specifically indicate ISIS affiliation or support. It appears to be anti-Houthi sentiment common in regional conflicts.
original_post: ما زال الحوثي النجس يجندل بطاغوت الجزيرة وجنوده ، اللهم أضربهم ببعض وأهلكهم جميعا #نجران #جازان
